title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Puma India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Puma India
jsonLd.description:
Puma India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Dhanbad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Puma India:
Puma India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Puma India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
